headline: How Investors May Respond To News (NWSA) Expanding Its US$1 Billion Share Buyback Authorization
summary: Earlier this week, News Corporation updated its capital return plans by authorizing the repurchase of up to US$1.00 billion of its Class A and Class B common stock as part of its existing buyback program. This enlarged authorization underlines management’s confidence in the company’s long-term prospects while immediately tightening the share count, which can amplify the impact of any future earnings growth for remaining shareholders. We’ll now examine how this expanded US$1.00 billion...
